answer: Twenty provides API access across its paid cloud plans and its free self-hosted offering. If you use the self-hosted version, which is free and open-source, you receive the same Pro-tier features, including full REST and GraphQL API access. On the managed cloud platform, API access is included in the Pro plan starting at $9 per user per month. There are no separate "API-only" plans; API usage is bundled into these subscriptions. All custom objects and fields you create in Twenty are automatically exposed via the API without additional configuration.
